entities.context: Scheduled process that archives C-state meetings automatically at 04:00 or 16:00 ET

entities.name: C-state
entities.context: Completion state for meetings, indicated by _[C] folder suffix

entities.name: P-state
entities.context: Pending/processing state for meetings, indicated by _[P] folder suffix

entities.name: Meeting Pipeline
entities.context: System for processing meeting folders through states in Personal/Meetings/Inbox/

relationships.context: MG-7C runs the archive script on its scheduled runs

C-state follows P-state in the meeting lifecycle
